description: Perform an outbound link audit on https://crawler-test.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Identify all external links and export the results to a CSV file in ~/Documents/SEO/exports/. Additionally, generate a text report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/external_links_report.txt containing the total count of external links, a list of the top external domains, any broken external links identified, and at least one actionable recommendation based on the findings.
